summary.business_type: Local Service (service-area business) — professional IT/web services
top_findings: Render-blocking Google Fonts CSS = top LCP/CLS risk (fixed: self-hosted latin WOFF2 + preload)
Thin content depth for hosting / malware-removal / developer queries (backlog)
GBP strategy unresolved — must NOT create a second listing (owner action)
quick_wins: Schema telephone normalized to visible format 1300 769 337 (fixed)
Founder Person node + entity name in footer (fixed)
Reciprocal link from supportperth.com.au (owner action, 5 minutes, biggest indexation lever)

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: Fully static HTML, zero JS-render dependency
robots.txt correctly blocks /api/ and declares sitemap
Zero tags — no image CLS/LCP weight

findings.title: No _headers file on Cloudflare Pages deploy
findings.description: Deploy would ship with zero security headers
findings.recommendation: FIXED — _headers created with CSP, HSTS, nosniff, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy, frame-ancestors, immutable font caching

findings.title: Render-blocking third-party font stylesheet
findings.description: fonts.googleapis.com CSS blocked first paint; hero H1 is the LCP element
findings.recommendation: FIXED — Ubuntu 400/500/700 latin subsets self-hosted (43KB), preloaded, font-display swap

findings.title: Title tag 71 chars with double branding
Rate limiting fails open without KV binding
findings.description: functions/api/contact.js skips rate limiting if RATE_LIMIT binding absent
findings.recommendation: OWNER — bind KV namespace pre-launch; consider Turnstile

findings.title: Mobile nav hidden below 760px, no hamburger
findings.description: Section links vanish; sticky header CTA remains
findings.recommendation: ACCEPTED trade-off for single-pager; revisit if bounce data suggests otherwise

findings.title: Telephone format mismatch schema vs page
findings.description: +61 1300 769 337 is not a valid AU inbound format and diverged from visible text

findings.title: No sameAs / openingHours / address
findings.description: Entity-consolidation signals missing; address defensible for SAB
findings.recommendation: OWNER — add GBP Maps URL + socials as sameAs; hours if policy exists; partial PostalAddress only if it matches GBP

findings.title: Cross-domain @id unverifiable offline
findings.description: https://supportperth.com.au/#organization must match byte-for-byte on the live apex
findings.recommendation: Verify with Rich Results Test post-launch

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: Symptom chips use literal WordPress error strings

findings.title: H1 omitted 'Perth'
findings.description: Primary geo-modifier absent from highest-weight element

findings.title: Thin coverage: hosting / malware / developer queries
findings.description: Two-sentence cards vs competitors' dedicated pages
findings.recommendation: BACKLOG — deepen on-page copy now; child pages month 2

findings.title: Aaron has no entity/bio
findings.description: Named twice, no credentials or Person schema
findings.recommendation: PARTIAL FIX — founder Person node added; visible micro-bio needs real career facts from owner

findings.title: No quantified facts in FAQ answers
findings.description: AI answer engines favour concrete numbers
findings.recommendation: OWNER — add response-time numbers only if operationally true

findings.title: Second GBP listing would be duplicate-listing spam risk
findings.description: Could trigger re-verification of the existing 5.0/25 profile
findings.recommendation: OWNER — one GBP; add WordPress services/categories to it

findings.title: Geo-thin body copy
findings.recommendation: FIXED — services intro + footer now carry Perth, WA (kept to 2 additions to avoid stuffing)

findings.title: No reciprocal link from apex
findings.description: New host inherits no authority without it
findings.recommendation: OWNER — add services-section link on supportperth.com.au

findings.title: No GBP/review link on page
findings.description: 5.0/25 claim not verifiable in one click
findings.recommendation: OWNER — add 'See our reviews' Maps link

phases.name: Phase 1: Pre-launch (owner)
items: GBP: add WP services to existing listing

artifacts.limitations: Pre-deployment file-only audit; no live crawl, CrUX, GSC, GA4, backlinks, or browser capture
